title: arum orientale subsp. engleri
intro: Arum orientale subsp. engleri, also known as the Cat's Tail Lily or Wild Cat's Tail, is a plant species in the Arum family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Arum orientale subsp. engleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and treat gastrointestinal disorders. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
